measures.title: Bonds to Improve Fire Stations and Acquire Apparatus
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes bonds to renovate and improve Yelm, Lake Lawrence, Rainier, and McIntosh Ridge fire stations and acquire firefighting and emergency response apparatus.
measures.cost_line: Authorizes up to $21,010,000 in general obligation bonds maturing within 25 years, repaid through annual excess property taxes.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for fire services.

measures.jurisdiction: Thurston County Fire Protection District No. 1
measures.title: Property Tax for Fire Maintenance and Operations
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes a four-year maintenance and operations levy to maintain fire services and emergency medical services in the Rochester-Grand Mound area.
measures.cost_line: Authorizes levy amounts from $826,166 in 2027 to $956,500 in 2030, at an approximate rate of $0.38 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for fire services.

measures.jurisdiction: Thurston County Fire Protection District No. 11
measures.title: Property Tax for Fire Maintenance and Operations
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes a four-year maintenance and operations levy to maintain fire services and emergency medical services in the Littlerock-Maytown area.
measures.cost_line: Authorizes levy amounts from $807,020 in 2027 to $934,226 in 2030, at an approximate rate of $0.38 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES approves a local tax or bond measure for fire services.
